exploration_notes:
The three-tier permission model (Viewer/Editor/Admin) is defined and enforced across these key areas:

**1. Role-to-permission mapping:**
- `pkg/apimachinery/identity/role_type.go` — Defines `RoleType` enum constants (`RoleViewer`, `RoleEditor`, `RoleAdmin`) with precedence ordering.
- `pkg/services/org/model.go` — Re-exports the role types for the org package.
